title: fix(pasta): assign map-host-loopback for rootless bridges
body: Fixes containers/podman#28718 - Ensures the outbound counterpart --map-host-loopback is supplied so host.containers.internal is reachable from rootless bridge containers.

comments.body: This is not correct and a potential security issue, https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28718#issuecomment-4471941702
